name: get_matrix
description: Compute travel time and distance matrices between multiple origins and destinations. Returns a matrix of durations (in seconds) and/or distances (in meters) for all coordinate pairs. Useful for logistics optimization, nearest-neighbor analysis, and fleet routing.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Routing profile. One of: mapbox/driving, mapbox/driving-traffic, mapbox/walking, mapbox/cycling.

parameters.name: coordinates
parameters.description: Semicolon-separated list of 2-25 coordinate pairs as 'longitude,latitude'. Max 10 for driving-traffic.

parameters.name: annotations
parameters.description: Comma-separated matrix types to return: duration, distance, or both. Default is duration.

parameters.name: sources
parameters.description: Semicolon-separated indices of coordinates to use as sources, or 'all'. Default is all.

parameters.name: destinations
parameters.description: Semicolon-separated indices of coordinates to use as destinations, or 'all'. Default is all.

parameters.name: fallback_speed
parameters.description: Speed in km/h used to estimate travel time for unreachable coordinate pairs.
